name: email-handler
description: Email command center for Dimitris Plessas. Reviews inbox via Apple Mail, drafts replies via Outlook. Briefings, insights, action flags, style-matched replies. Self-improves by comparing drafts to actual responses.

email-handler.description: Reviews inbox via Apple Mail, creates reply drafts via Outlook, with briefings, action recommendations in Dimitris Plessas's style

shared.description: Communication style guide, recipient profiles, and learning data
